subject: NY
body:
Jeffrey

Do you think NY on Monday is still possible?
I guess It makes sense to leave the G550 in PBI until Wednesday then fly it to Boca, Since Trump arrival is Friday.,

Should I leave plane in PBI until Wednesday?

Thx
Larry

Sent from my iPhone
